overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a noir detective game showing a character in a suit and fedora walking through a dimly lit 1940s-style bar or restaurant. The character moves from the entrance past the wooden bar counter with patrons and staff, toward a back room area with warm incandescent lighting and period decor.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden bar interior with ceiling fans and booth seating

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward the bar counter from the entrance area

notable_agents.action: bartender standing behind the counter preparing drinks
patron sitting in red vinyl booth facing away from camera

entered.detail: long wooden bar with bottles and glasses visible behind it
upholstered booth seating with wooden dividers
multiple framed pictures hanging on the wall in a row
wooden ceiling fan with lights hanging from the ceiling
wall-mounted light fixture with warm glow

segments.scene_description: The character enters the dimly lit bar from the entrance corridor, approaching the main wooden bar counter. Red vinyl booths line the right wall beneath framed artwork, while ceiling fans rotate overhead. The bartender works behind the counter and a patron sits in the nearest booth.

scene_state.functional_zone: bar counter area with stools and chalkboard menu

events.description: character turns slightly right to navigate past the bar stools

agents.ego_description: walking along the bar counter, passing patrons seated on stools

notable_agents.action: woman in white apron standing near the end of the bar
patron sitting on bar stool facing the counter

entered.detail: round wooden stools lined up along the bar counter
dark chalkboard with writing mounted on the wall

segments.scene_description: The character moves along the length of the bar, passing wooden bar stools where patrons sit. The bartender and a woman in a white apron are visible behind the counter. A chalkboard menu appears on the back wall as the red vinyl booths recede behind the camera.

scene_state.functional_zone: back dining area with tables and illuminated doorway

events.description: character moves from bar area into back dining room with tables

agents.ego_description: walking toward the back of the restaurant approaching a lit doorway

notable_agents.action: patron sitting alone at a wooden table facing the wall

entered.detail: square wooden table with papers and items on top
doorway emitting bright light leading to another room

segments.scene_description: Leaving the bar behind, the character enters the back dining area with scattered wooden tables. A lone patron sits at a table on the left. The character approaches a brightly lit doorway at the back of the room, while framed artwork continues along the walls.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit 1940s bar that gradually opens into a brightly lit back dining area. It begins as the character enters from a corridor, moving past red vinyl booths and rotating ceiling fans toward the main wooden bar counter. As the character progresses along the length of the bar, the booths recede and the view shifts to reveal patrons on wooden stools and a chalkboard menu on the back wall. The scene then expands as the camera leaves the bar area behind, gliding past scattered wooden tables and a lone patron in the dining room. Finally, the movement culminates as the character approaches a brightly lit doorway at the far end of the room, with framed artwork lining the walls throughout the transition.
